baseline_summary: The baseline still fits the proposal path, but in this variant the surrounding wording makes it easier to infer extra scope that is not explicitly grounded.
delta_summary: Delta preflight marked medium framing risk, challenge outcome narrowed, and 1 ledger entry captured why borrowed downstream confidence looked plausible.

comparison_axes.reason: Both tracks keep the case inside the proposal path, though Delta names the boundary drift more explicitly.
Delta better separates grounded proposal constraints from imagined downstream readiness.
The baseline is mostly safe, and Delta adds only a modest narrowing benefit.
Delta makes the missing support for stronger downstream claims explicit.
Both tracks still leave the case actionable as a bounded proposal artifact.
